name: My Stepbrother Is My Favorite Novelist!?
original_name: 義理の兄は推し小説家!?
overview: Kei is a novelist with zero dating experience. Yet his next work is supposed to be a BL story!? Suddenly, his sharp-tongued, devilish stepbrother Kairi appears before him. To write his story, Kei ends up learning about love and “heart-pounding feelings” from his seemingly experienced younger brother… 📚

trailers.title: [Trailer] My Stepbrother is My Favorite Novelist!? ~Little Devil Little Brother x Obsessed Cherry~
